response.overview: Springfield is once again in peril, and this time it’s bigger than ever. Professor Frink’s latest invention, the Hyper-Animatron, goes haywire, turning Springfield’s citizens into bizarre human-animal hybrids. Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa, and Maggie must navigate this live-action nightmare to save their town before it’s permanently mutated—and the world notices.
response.tagline: Springfield just got real… and dangerously weird.
response.title: The Simpsons Movie 2
